name: shakespeare-ide-context
description: Sends bounded VS Code and Cursor editor context to the local Shakespeare desktop app.

shakespeare.bridgeUrl.description: Local Shakespeare IDE context bridge endpoint.

shakespeare.autoSend.description: Automatically refresh local IDE context when the active editor, selection, diagnostics, or saved document changes.

shakespeare.includeGitDiff.description: Include a bounded git diff for the active file when available.

shakespeare.maxVisibleCharacters.description: Maximum visible editor characters sent to the local app before the desktop app applies its own caps.
